══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Elf — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Elf — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Elf — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Elf — Winged Striker HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Elf — Winged Striker HP: 11/67
--- Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 11/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Elf — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Elf — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Elf — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Elf — Winged Striker HP: -5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
